_publications._publicationTitle: Establishment of immortalized murine mesothelial cells and a novel mesothelioma cell line.
_publications._context: We generated SV40-immortalized cell lines derived from wild-type (WT) and neurofibromatosis 2 (merlin) heterozygote (Nf2+/-) mice, both on a commonly used genetic background, C57Bl/6J. | p16/p19+/− mice were crossed to Nf2 mice to obtain all of the genotypes used herein. All mice were in a comparable FVB genetic background

_publications._publicationTitle: Tumor suppressor alterations cooperate to drive aggressive mesotheliomas with enriched cancer stem cells via a p53-miR-34a-c-Met axis.
